title: Fix Tooltip Text for Metric LOB/Topic Confirm and Cancel Buttons
story: As a DataTools Pro user editing Line of Business or Topic categories, I want the confirm and cancel button tooltips to display the correct text, so that I can clearly distinguish between the two actions.
description:
Both the confirm and cancel buttons for the Metric LOB/Topic editing controls displayed the same tooltip text ("Click to Cancel"). This fix updates the tooltips so the confirm button shows "Confirm" and the cancel button shows "Cancel".

## Before

- Confirm button tooltip: "Click to Cancel" (incorrect)
- Cancel button tooltip: "Click to Cancel"

## After

- Confirm button tooltip: "Confirm"
- Cancel button tooltip: "Cancel"
acceptance_criteria: Tooltips are correctly differentiated between the two buttons
ux_changes: Corrected tooltip text on the LOB/Topic editing confirm and cancel buttons. Confirm button now shows 'Confirm' instead of 'Click to Cancel'.
implementation_notes: Simple tooltip text correction on the confirm/cancel action buttons for LOB/Topic category editing.
